site.title: Order - Gothenburg University Library
site.description: Order and queue for materials from Gothenburg University Library.

closed.title: The ordering service is temporarily closed
closed.description: We apologize for the inconvenience, but our ordering service is currently unavailable. We are working to resolve the issue as quickly as possible. Please try again later or Contact the library for assistance.

guAuth.title: Sign in with your GU account
guAuth.description: For students and employees at GU with a gus account or x-account.

githubAuth.title: Sign in with GitHub
githubAuth.description: To order materials, you need to sign in with your GitHub account.

kohaAuth.title: Sign in with library account
kohaAuth.description: For users who do not have a GU account.

orderDenied.title: Cannot place order
orderDenied.description: Something went wrong. Contact the library for assistance.
orderDenied.descriptionWithMissingId: Search for something to order on the library's website.

errors.ITEM_NOT_FOUND: Could not find the material you are trying to order.

labels.location: Where do you want to pick it up?
labels.loanType: How do you want to borrow?
labels.reserveNotes: Any additional information about the order
labels.publicNote: You can order copies from the following holdings:

placeholders.reserveNotes: For example: volume, issue, year of publication
placeholders.subscriptionNotes: Specify volume, year, issue or page number of the copy you want to order.

messages.privacyWarning: Information in this field will be printed. Do not enter personal data here. Contact the library if you have questions about your order.

message.errorLoadingData: Could not load all necessary data to display order details. Try again later or contact the library.
message.noAvailableItems: There are no available copies right now.
message.noNotAvailableItems: There are no loaned copies right now.
message.infoAboutAvailableItems: There are available copies that you can order
message.hasAvaillableCourseBook: There are available copies that you can pick up yourself from the shelf
message.unsupportedViewType: This type of material ({viewType}) does not support displaying order details. Contact the library.

statusLimitation.READING_ROOM_ONLY: Reading room loan only, not for home loan

actions.collect: Pick up yourself from the shelf

biblio.title: Your order
biblio.errorLoadingData: Could not load all necessary data to display order details. Try again later or contact the library.
